creator: liu_yinghong@yahoo.com.cn
text:
GPG-Crypter is a GTK+ frontend to GPG and it is intended to de- and
encrypt text into ASCII-armored gpg-ciphers. It provides textboxes
to enter plaintext or ciphers. File encryption and decryption is
available since version 0.2.

WWW: http://gpg-crypter.sourceforge.net/
